top_signals.title: Korea Details Plan to Make Won Freely Tradable Abroad
top_signals.summary: South Korea laid out a detailed plan to make the won freely tradable among foreigners, its boldest step yet to liberalize the forex market and bring the currency closer to full convertibility.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: From 'Super El Niño' to Europe’s extreme heatwave: How this year's weather shocks are rattling commodity markets
top_signals.summary: Markets are underestimating the impact of climate volatility on a range of asset classes, commodity strategists say.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to drop as Burnham becomes PM; City awaits new Chancellor
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM liveblog. It’s Monday and all eyes are on 10 Downing Street. Sir Keir Starmer will visit King Charles to formally resign as Prime Minister. Andy Burnham will then officially become his successor and deliver his first speech as Prime Minister. The market, which has long been trying to size [...]
